# Fixture provenance and license

All fixtures initially described by `corpus.v1.json` are procedurally generated by the StringSight project. They contain no sampled performances, third-party audio, photographs, video, or model output.

The procedural fixture assets and their annotations are released under the repository's MIT License. Their source is recorded as `stringsight-procedural-generator` with generator version and deterministic seed in the corpus manifest.

Future recorded fixtures must add an individual source record containing creator or collection, consent status, license identifier, and source URL when applicable. A fixture without complete provenance must fail corpus review and must not be committed.
